name: UploadCheck.app Launch Status
description: Machine-readable Product Hunt launch state for UploadCheck.app agents and operators.

verified_controls.evidence: scripts/qc-engine/run_gate.py is wired through hosted store for resolvable media.
npm run codex:verify-install checks the global uploadcheck MCP server entry, hosted API base URL, executable wrapper, and installed skill.
CLI/MCP/API support inline media payloads with sanitized mediaIngress and sha256.
Large local files can use signed upload before job creation.
qc_estimate_cost and job creation support plan-aware cost_guardrail downgrade/block/off.
npm run cost-basis:verify checks public cost-per-minute and 95% gross-margin assumptions against cost-model.mjs.
npm run roadmap:verify checks the 50-point plan, expert-panel coverage, NTO replacement addendum, and execution-status markers.
Public PASS, WATCH, and BLOCK sample report JSON artifacts are linked from /sample-report/, agent-manifest.json, and llms.txt.
Public product-hunt-launch-kit.json packages launch copy, demo flow, sample-report links, cost-basis proof, and go/no-go rule for operators and agents.
Reports and margin telemetry distinguish estimated and observed provider COGS.
Plan usage metering is idempotent per job/billing period, and declared jobs that exceed included minutes or AI-review seconds return usage_limit_exceeded before QC runs.
Job creation and upload reservation fail fast on duration_limit_exceeded, upload_size_limit_exceeded, and active_job_limit_exceeded.
Jobs persist startedAt, completedAt, processingDurationMs, stage elapsed times, provider usage entry counts, and fallback failureReason telemetry.
POST /v1/qc/jobs supports process_async=true and POST /v1/qc/jobs/drain processes queued jobs for Render worker/cron execution.
npm run packages:verify checks @uploadcheck/cli and @uploadcheck/mcp pack contents.

npm run render:bootstrap-env pre-fills generated API hash and webhook encryption values; npm run render:validate-env rejects placeholders, weak secrets, invalid URLs, invalid API hashes, incomplete object storage, and non-durable paths before render:apply.

go_no_go_rule: Do not claim Product Hunt launch readiness until GET /v1/readiness returns readyForProductHunt=true and npm run launch:check passes DNS and HTTP for uploadcheck.app, www.uploadcheck.app, and api.uploadcheck.app.
